pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 15 defines EVIDENCE_FILE variable with this exact path, lines 19-29 create and populate file at this location
export_result.sh line 13 defines REPORT_PATH with this exact path; task.json task description (line 5) specifies 'Create an audit report at ~/evidence_audit_report.txt'
setup_task.sh line 82 writes case number to /home/ga/case_to_audit.txt; line 83 sets permissions; task.json description references 'locate the complaint case specified in ~/case_to_audit.txt'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on three synthetic file paths that are correctly defined in the metadata. The evidence file at /home/ga/evidence/server_access_logs.txt is generated during setup with realistic Apache log entries and random padding. The case is created via ArkCase REST API with a dynamically generated case number. The case info path /home/ga/case_to_audit.txt stores the case number created by the setup script. The report path /home/ga/evidence_audit_report.txt is where the agent must write its audit findings. All data is synthetic and generated during task initialization.
